meaning: adj.[地]鲕粒岩的 像鲕粒岩的
examples: Their main mineral is kaolinite, usually in pisolitic, oolitic or clastic structure.
The major ores of this deposit have a banded(streaky), pisolitic or oolitic structure.
Arenite dolomite, oolitic dolomite, silty dolomite, silty-fine dolomite, oolitic limestone and arenite are of reservoir signification.
